title: Crimson Moon's Semblance
description: Adds a spear from the game Genshin Impact
body:
## Crimson Moon's Semblance
**This texture pack adds the exquisite Crimson Moon's Semblance scythe to Minecraft, straight from Genshin Impact. This detailed 3D model of the scythe boasts exceptional beauty and elegance. To see the texture in the game, all you need to do is rename a Netherite sword to CrimsonMoon in an anvil. And just like magic, the standard sword will transform into this magnificent scythe!
Important: For the 3D model and scythe texture to display correctly, it is recommended to install OptiFine or OptiFabric.**
